issue.title: [Task]: Validate structured issue intake
issue.body:
### Work Type

Feature

### Problem / Goal

Create the first Blueprint validation loop for structured issue intake.

### Context

This sandbox repository is used to validate Iterwheel GitHub App routing.

### Expected Outcome

The bridge records whether each issue is ready for Blueprint processing.

### Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The issue template captures required intake sections.
- [ ] The bridge marks complete issues as blueprint_ready.

### Reproduction Steps / Task Plan

1. Create a structured issue.
2. Receive the GitHub webhook.
3. Record the Blueprint validation result.

### Priority

P2 - normal

### Requester / Owner

@frankyxhl
